faqs.question: How much does squirrel removal cost in Flatlands, Brooklyn?
faqs.answer: Squirrel removal in Flatlands typically ranges from $900 to $2,500 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of entry points, and extent of damage. This includes humane trapping, exclusion work to seal entry points, and cleanup. We provide free inspections and detailed estimates for all Flatlands properties.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove squirrels from my Flatlands home?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day emergency service in Flatlands and can typically begin the removal process within 24 hours of your call. faqs.question: What damage can squirrels cause to Flatlands homes?
faqs.answer: Squirrels commonly damage insulation, chew through electrical wiring (creating fire hazards), tear up roof shingles, and gnaw on wooden beams and soffits. In Flatlands' older homes, they often exploit existing gaps in rooflines and vents. Their droppings and urine can also contaminate attic spaces and create health hazards that require professional sanitation.

faqs.question: Do you offer guarantees for squirrel removal in Flatlands?
faqs.answer: Yes, we provide a comprehensive warranty on all squirrel exclusion work in Flatlands. If squirrels re-enter through any area we've sealed, we'll return to fix the problem at no additional charge. Our thorough inspection and reinforced exclusion methods ensure long-term protection for your Flatlands home.
